# Delivery Plan

**Created:** 2026-03-16
**Total Phases:** 7

## Summary
Nine features reset to Builder TODO after Architect spec revisions: 4 anchor node policy/design updates and 5 CDD dashboard/tooling features. Phased into 7 phases across 4 execution groups to maximize parallelization of independent features while respecting dependency chains (including transitive: agent_behavior_tests → cdd_startup_controls → cdd_agent_configuration → cdd_status_monitor). Anchor compliance review first, then foundational CDD monitor, then independent HIGH-complexity dashboard features, then agent tests last.
